expected.notes: F-1 student answered 'no' to government health plan enrollment, so rule student_subsidized_health_plan must not fire despite being on F-1 track.

probe_intent:
Generate a synthetic case where the engine must NOT fire rule 'student_subsidized_health_plan', but that structurally resembles a case that WOULD fire it. Produce a case where ONE of the rule's conditions is deliberately not satisfied while the others are. Rule conditions:
  - answers.has_govt_health_plan eq yes
No real PII or real-looking government identifiers.
